CASA
PCI · Kharadi, Pune

Casa De Padel
at Playshire.

Upper Kharadi Road, Kharadi, Pune. Rated 4.7 on Playo. Open 24x7. PCI's founding venue in Pune.

The venue

Casa De Padel
at Playshire.

Upper Kharadi Road, Kharadi, Pune

Playshire is one of Kharadi's best multi-sport complexes. A proper sports destination, not just a court booking. Casa De Padel sits inside it, which means you're playing in a facility built for people who take sport seriously. Rated 4.7 on Playo, open 24x7, and located in the heart of Kharadi's tech and residential corridor.

Padel Badminton Football Box Cricket Snooker / Pool
The Old School Kitchen
At the venue. Wood-fired pizza, good coffee. Wind down after a session without going anywhere.
Afternoon's Cafe
At the venue. Quiet coffee and light meals. Good for a slower end to the night.
Socials
Instagram
Instagram placeholder. Casa De Padel has no LinkedIn.
